name: Galactic Canon
description: The authoritative decision bank for Galactic development. Connected agents should search Canon before consequential work, treat active decisions as constraints, explain conflicts, and record newly settled decisions with rationale and evidence.

context_sources.label: Active Canon decisions
context_sources.description: Current development constraints with rationale, consequences, provenance, and review dates.
context_sources.query: SELECT id, title, statement, rationale, consequences, decided_at, effective_at, author_type, author_label, source_ref, review_due_at, updated_at FROM decisions WHERE user_id = :user_id AND status = 'active' AND (title LIKE :query OR statement LIKE :query OR rationale LIKE :query OR consequences LIKE :query) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT :limit

prompt_examples: show active decisions that constrain the admin agent spine
what has Canon decided about full-time agent context

context_sources.label: Canon tags
context_sources.description: The user-managed taxonomy applied to decisions.

canon_create.description: Record a newly settled canonical decision. Use this only after a choice is settled; include rationale, constraints, tags, provenance, and evidence. The decision is active immediately, revision 1 is preserved, and semantic embedding is best-effort.

alternatives.description: Alternatives considered and why they were not chosen.

consequences.description: Constraints, follow-up work, risks, and expected consequences.

tags.description: User-managed scope and topic tags; missing tags are created automatically.

decided_at.description: When the decision was actually settled; ISO timestamp. Defaults to now.

effective_at.description: When this decision begins constraining work; ISO timestamp.

review_due_at.description: Optional date when the decision should be reconsidered.

author_label.description: Human or agent label, e.g. Russell + Codex or Codex.

source_ref.description: Originating task, session, PR, or other reference.

evidence.description: References with ref plus optional type, label, and metadata.

canon_get.description: Read one decision with tags, comments, relationships, evidence, and immutable revision history.

canon_update.description: Edit the current view of a decision or replace its complete tag set. Every meaningful edit creates an immutable revision. Use canon_supersede instead of silently reversing a decision.

canon_list.description: List decisions by status, tags, and review date without semantic inference.

canon_search.description: Hybrid semantic, keyword, tag, and status search over Canon. Embedding failure falls back to deterministic lexical ranking.

canon_context.description: Retrieve a bounded decision packet for a connected agent's current task. Active decisions are constraints; relationships and evidence are included, with optional canonical comments.

query.description: The development task or question needing Canon context.

include_comments.description: Include comments explicitly marked for context.

canon_supersede.description: Make an existing replacement decision supersede an older decision. Preserves both records, creates a typed relationship, and marks the older record historical.

canon_archive.description: Soft-archive a decision without deleting its history.

canon_comment_add.description: Attach a timestamped note, question, implementation detail, outcome, or clarification to a decision. Comments remain distinct from canonical decision text.

include_in_context.description: Allow this comment into canon_context packets.

canon_comment_update.description: Edit, resolve, context-promote, or soft-delete a decision comment.

canon_relation_add.description: Add a typed decision relationship. Supersession must use canon_supersede.

canon_relation_remove.description: Remove a non-supersession decision relationship by ID.

canon_evidence_add.description: Attach a PR, commit, file, URL, task, run, or generic reference as evidence for a decision.

canon_evidence_remove.description: Remove an evidence attachment without deleting the decision or its revisions.

canon_tags.description: List, create/update, or archive user-managed decision tags. action defaults to list.

canon_reembed.description: Repair or migrate semantic embeddings for one decision or a bounded batch. Defaults to failed embeddings only.

canon_status.description: Counts, embedding health, and decisions whose review date has arrived.

interfaces.label: Canon
interfaces.description: Browse, search, create, edit, tag, discuss, relate, and supersede Galactic's canonical decisions.
